notes: FROZEN (daemon_capability: incapable). kiro performs instantiation (b) of architect-editor-pair — /plan switches to the built-in kiro_planner Plan agent and switch_to_execution presents a y/n approve→execute gate (agent_supports: yes) — but the approval pause produces no daemon-observable waiting episode: switch_to_execution is absent from the global user-blocking tool list (only AskUserQuestion/ExitPlanMode/question), kiro has no hook system so PermissionPending never fires, the kirocli parser has no waiting branch and no switch_to_execution→ExitPlanMode synthesis (unlike codex's <proposed_plan> path that makes codex's 5.4 daemon=full), and the y/n approval is a TUI overlay with no JSONL event. The scenario REQUIRES a user-visible waiting episode (ready→working→waiting→working→ready), which never reaches the transport, so no phases are asserted. It is NOT the Aider two-models-in-one-turn shape (instantiation a): kiro has no within-turn dual-model orchestration. Same root-cause daemon-incapability as the recorded-frozen sibling 2.18; frozen at the DAEMON layer (not the AGENT layer like pi 5.4). The kiro JSONL also carries no model/token/cost (sidecar only), hence the unknown/false observation vector.
